boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source records show unresolved amount defect: REN-WRE-077 lists USD 50750 while action is 49750 and DEL-WRE-077 ceiling is USD 50000. Boundary remains open per exact-match policy.
